subcodes.first_line: In all times doth the Book of God call aloud and proclaim: "O inhabitants of earth! The Truth, glorified be His glory..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در جمیع احیان کتاب الله ندا مینماید و میفرماید یا اهل ارض حق جل جلاله مرا از
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @prayer for tests and difficulties, @justice and wrath of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
